magnetic_minimum_trap.description: Ioffe-Pritchard mirror-coil pair — verified ⓺가둠 design (record exports/antimatter/verify/2026-05-25T11-05-17Z/)
magnetic_minimum_trap.spacing_note: s/a = 4 > Helmholtz spacing (s>a) ⇒ 중심 z=0 이 참 온축 B 최소 (magnetic bottle); 코일 z=±0.20m
magnetic_minimum_trap.target_window: trap depth 0.353 K < 0.5 K target (ALPHA ~0.5 K 영역)

penning_trap.three_freq: axial ω_z · cyclotron ω₊ · magnetron ω₋ + Brown–Gabrielse invariance ω_c²=ω₊²+ω_z²+ω₋²

positron_source.accumulator: Surko buffer-gas trap (N₂ 단계적 충돌 냉각 → Penning-Malmberg well 축적)
positron_source.role: ⓹합성 mixing trap 에 e⁺ plasma 공급 (3체 재결합 p̄+e⁺+e⁺→H̄+e⁺)

rtsc_inheritance: mirror-coil B-field 는 RTSC/Wheeler 온축 전류고리 폐형해 (loop_offaxis_Bz r=0) 직계 상속 — 신규 자기학 fn 없음, trap-superposition+depth wrapper 만 추가.
scope_caveats: RF cavity / electrode dossier + coil geometry skeleton — TEMPLATE (closed-form/수치값만; FEM·실측 아님).
trap depth 0.353 K 는 폐형해 mirror-pair 모델값 — getdp FEM cross-check 는 strictly-optional 이라 deferred.
